form.formComment: Drawn the inside. At the last outing finished 7th over 380m at this track beaten 15 lengths (23.01) behind Aussie Audi in a Grade 5 on April 10. Major threat on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and made contact with the inside running rail in the back straight.

form.formComment: Could only manage eighth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (22.35) over 380m at this track. Aided by a low draw but will need everything to go her way.
